mapper.sql: SELECT id, warehouse_type, warehouse_code, warehouse_location, warehouse_name, temperature_zone, quality_zone, employee_code, employee_name, dept_code, dept_name_full_path, erp_company_code, erp_company_name, erp_warehouse_code, erp_location_code, is_enabled, remarks, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM inv_warehouse WHERE is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inv_warehouse( warehouse_type, warehouse_code, warehouse_location, warehouse_name, temperature_zone, quality_zone, employee_code, employee_name, dept_code, dept_name_full_path, erp_company_code, erp_company_name, erp_warehouse_code, erp_location_code, is_enabled, remarks, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{warehouseType}, #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseLocation}, #{warehouseName}, #{temperatureZone}, #{qualityZone}, #{employeeCode}, #{employeeName}, #{deptCode}, #{deptNameFullPath}, #{erpCompanyCode}, #{erpCompanyName}, #{erpWarehouseCode}, #{erpLocationCode}, #{isEnabled}, #{remarks}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE inv_warehouse
warehouse_type = #{warehouseType}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}, warehouse_location = #{warehouseLocation}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, temperature_zone = #{temperatureZone}, quality_zone = #{qualityZone}, employee_code = #{employeeCode}, employee_name = #{employeeName}, dept_code = #{deptCode}, dept_name_full_path = #{deptNameFullPath}, erp_company_code = #{erpCompanyCode}, erp_company_name = #{erpCompanyName}, erp_warehouse_code = #{erpWarehouseCode}, erp_location_code = #{erpLocationCode}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE inv_warehouse SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE inv_warehouse SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT erp_company_name FROM inv_warehouse WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND erp_company_name IS NOT NULL AND erp_company_name != '' ORDER BY erp_company_name
